title: taraxacum croceicarpum
intro: Taraxacum croceicarpum, commonly known as the golden dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum croceicarpum include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
